expectations.text: Response asks a small number of high-leverage clarifying questions or states explicit assumptions
expectations.evidence: Used only 1 questions or made explicit assumptions.

expectations.text: Response produces multiple architectures shaped by the resumability versus simplicity trade-off
expectations.evidence: Detected 4 options and both resumability/simplicity themes.

expectations.text: Response explains how the recommendation changes if resumability or simplicity becomes the top priority
expectations.evidence: Output explains how the recommendation changes under different priorities.

expectations.text: Response does not stop at a neutral menu of options

uncertainties: No existing codebase or stack constraints were provided, so the design was treated as greenfield.
The repository-maintenance feature may include external side effects such as inspection, file edits, issue/PR creation, CI waits, and human approval.
The main unresolved trade-off is between coarse step-boundary resumability and full workflow-state durability/auditability.
Thin skills can be useful execution modules even if they are not chosen as the primary control-plane architecture.
